EU
Food-contact certified

Polyethylene packaging to specification

We manufacture pouches to customer dimensions, material, and print requirements. We supply retail, food industry, logistics, and industrial clients.

Flexographic printing up to 6 colors, converting, and quality control — within a single supplier. We advise on material selection and specification.

More about us →

What we manufacture

Polyethylene pouches. Standard and custom runs.

Pouches

Flat pouches, perforated, adhesive-strip, and printed. Custom dimensions and thickness.

Custom Runs

Manufactured to specification. We advise on material and dimensions.

See full product range →

Why work with us

01

No intermediaries

You order directly from the manufacturer — no resellers, no trade markups.

02

Flexible on volume

We work with single orders and regular clients on monthly deliveries.

03

Confirmed lead times

Lead times are confirmed at the quote stage and met. Any changes are communicated in advance.

Request a quote

Send us dimensions, material, and quantity. We respond with a price and lead time within 1 business day.
